query: what customs duty-free allowances and import restrictions apply to US citizens entering Japan - alcohol, tobacco, currency declaration thresholds, and prohibited or restricted items

chosen.content_snippet:
Main Contents begins from here

# CUSTOMS REGULATIONS ( Airport Guide )

## DUTY-FREE ALLOWANCE

Entering to Japan, the duty-free allowances will be made for certain other articles within the limits as specified below.

### Alcoholic Beverages (Must be age 20 or older)

3 bottles (A bottle contains approximately 760 cc.)

### Tobacco Products (Must be age 20 or older)

For visitors:

Cigars: 100 cigars

Cigarettes: 400 cigarettes

Other kinds of tobacco: 500 grams

preference_rationale: Rank 3 (https://www.jal.co.jp/jp/en/inter/airport/japan/customs.html) should be preferred over Rank 1 (https://www.cbp.gov/travel/international-visitors/know-before-you-visit/customs-duty-information) because Rank 3 has query_relevance_score=1.0 with full coverage of alcohol, tobacco, currency declaration (¥1,000,000), and prohibited items, while Rank 1 has query_relevance_score=0.0 and answers_query=false, covering only US customs rules for returning residents. Rank 2 (https://www.denver.us.emb-japan.go.jp/itpr_en/en_visitjapan_customquarantine.html) should also rank above Rank 1 due to its authority_score=0.95 and query_relevance_score=0.85 as an official Japanese government source.
